browse.emptyDesc: Try loosening the filters or clearing your search keywords.

about.title: About Open Jam
about.lede: Open Jam is Taiwan’s marketplace for creators’ digital goods. We let creators sell their sheet music, photography, and e-books directly to supporters, and let every shopper buy collectible digital works in just a few steps.

sec1.title: What the platform does
sec1.body: Open Jam is built in the spirit of Gumroad: creators focus on creating while the platform handles storefronts, payments, and file delivery. Creators open a shop on their own subdomain and list their works; shoppers browse the marketplace and buy what they love — all without tedious sign-ups or app downloads.

sec3.title: What you can buy
sec3.body: The marketplace currently supports the following digital product categories, and keeps expanding:

features.title: One-click storefront
features.text: Once approved, creators can open a shop on a dedicated subdomain <creator>.openjam.co and list sheet music, photo collections, or e-books.

features.title: Buy without signing up
features.text: Shoppers don’t need an account — just an email at checkout to complete a purchase, and the download link is sent straight to their inbox.

features.title: Secure downloads
features.text: After purchase the platform issues a time-limited download link, opened only after the file is processed and verified, protecting creators’ work.

cta.text: Are you a creator? Bring your work to Open Jam.

sections.p: Open Jam is a marketplace platform where creators list and sell digital works (music, images, e-books, and more). By creating an account or using the service, you agree to the following terms.
You must be at least 13 years old to register. You are responsible for your account activity and password security, and you agree to provide accurate registration information.
All works you list must be content you own or are licensed to use. The following are strictly prohibited:
list: Content that infringes others’ intellectual property rights
Content that violates local law or our community guidelines

sections.p: Open Jam charges no monthly fee; once a work sells, the platform takes a 3% transaction fee. Funds are paid out to your linked payout account according to the settlement cycle.
You retain full copyright in your works. To display and sell them on the platform, you grant Open Jam a non-exclusive, worldwide license to host, display, and promote your works.
If you violate these terms, we may suspend or terminate your account. You may also delete your account at any time in settings.
This policy explains how Open Jam collects, uses, and protects your personal data. By using the service, you acknowledge and agree to the practices below.
To provide the service, we collect the following information:
list: Account data: display name, email, password (stored encrypted)
Transaction data: purchase and sales records, payout account
Usage data: device, browser, and interaction records

sections.p: We use your data to operate the platform, process transactions, provide customer support, and — with your consent — send product updates and marketing notices.
We do not sell your personal data. We share it with necessary third-party providers only for payment processing, when required by law, or when you have authorized it.
We protect your password and sensitive data with industry-standard encryption and review our security measures regularly. However, no system can guarantee absolute security.

You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data, and you may unsubscribe from marketing notices at any time. You can handle these requests via the settings page or by contacting support.

onboarding.title: About this platform

s1.title: This is a side project
s1.body: Open Jam is a personal side project, built purely for technical experimentation and as a portfolio showcase — it is not a commercially operated platform.

s2.title: Payments are in test mode
s2.body: Checkout only connects to Stripe’s {testMode}, so no real charges are ever made. Please do not enter real credit card details; you can use a Stripe test card number (for example {card}).

s3.title: Data is for demonstration only
s3.body: The works and data on the site are sample content and may be changed or reset at any time. Please do not use it for real transactions.

onboarding.coachGithubDesc: The platform’s full source code repository

hero.eyebrow: OPEN JAM · A marketplace for creators
hero.title: Turn your creative work into something people can {collect}, {support} and {remember}.
hero.slogan: A home for independent work — where what you make finds its people.
hero.scrollHint: Scroll down to start the story

story.title: What can creators sell here?
story.hint: Keep scrolling — the story goes on

music.label: Music
music.title: From rough demos to finished records
music.desc: A demo, a sample pack, a set of tabs — turn the sound in your practice room into the starting point of someone else's craft.

photo.label: Photography
photo.title: After the shutter, a second life
photo.desc: Presets, photo packs, prints for the wall and wallpapers — the work sleeping on your drive is something people will take home.

ebook.label: E-book
ebook.title: Words, delivered straight to readers
ebook.desc: A zine, a guide, a long-form story written chapter by chapter — no publisher's nod needed, publish the day you finish.

flow.title: From upload to storefront in minutes.
flow.sub: Not just a showcase — this is where support actually reaches you.

steps.title: Upload your work
steps.text: Audio, photos, PDFs — just drag them in.

steps.title: Set your price
steps.text: Fixed price or pay-what-you-want — your call.

steps.title: Build your storefront
steps.text: Your own subdomain shop, open in a minute.

steps.title: Share the link
steps.text: Drop it in your bio, video descriptions, anywhere.

steps.title: Get supported
steps.text: Buyers pay and download with just an email.

discover.title: Discover independent works before they become mainstream.
discover.text: Every purchase directly supports a creator. Browse the market, follow the shops you love, and keep every find in your library — ready to download anytime.

items.title: No algorithm hostage
items.text: Your work doesn't have to please a feed. The people following you actually want to see you.

items.title: Creators and works first
items.text: Clean storefronts and direct support — no ads, no noise.

items.title: Built for small creators
items.text: No contracts, no gatekeeping — publish today, sell today.

items.title: Musician-friendly, not music-only
items.text: From waveforms to photos to words, every craft is a first-class citizen.

cta.eyebrow: The next page of the story is yours to turn
